title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Balle O Chalaak Sajjna
desc: Two brothers get married to two sisters. However, they strive to overcome challenges when people try to sabotage their married lives.

title: Oye Bhole Oye
desc: Bhola seeks work in the city where he meets and falls for Aveera, who is captivated by his simplicity. Their romance faces peril when Bhola is compelled to save his village.

title: Jodi
desc: In 1980s Punjab, two folk artists fall in love while revolutionising music, becoming a celebrated duo but facing mysterious challenges as their fame grows.

title: Jatt & Juliet
desc: The only thing connecting Pooja and Fateh is an air journey to Canada. But once they land there, circumstances compel them to stick together.

title: Sufna
desc: Jeet, a carefree young man, and Teg, a poor labourer working in the fields, fall in love with each other. However, they face several difficulties in maintaining their relationship.

title: Romeo Ranjha
desc: Romeo and Ranjha meet in Thailand and soon begin to make a living by cheating people. However, they get a taste of their own medicine after Ranjha falls in love.

title: Saab Bahadar
desc: Kuldeep Singh is a small town police officer with a penchant for mystery novels. The monotonous life of the lawman changes when he starts investigating the murder of a prominent citizen.

title: Shukrana
desc: Shukrana, a young girl, must deal with her conservative family while also dealing with Shehroz, a crazed lover.
